commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9cf16d7b9e731001265419ebad44f76eda274e90)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds delivery-target aliases to cron target resolution, passes them into source delivery matching, and adds regression tests for Slack name-to-channel-ID fallback suppression.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +71. Total +106 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main compares the message-tool target only against the resolved delivery target, so a Slack name and canonical channel ID can miss. I did not run a live Slack cron reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed to narrow the alias set and provide real behavior proof; automation should not advance this PR while the proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(cron): suppress announce fallback for resolved targets
target.body:
## Summary
- carry delivery target aliases from cron target resolution into the source delivery plan
- compare message-tool sends against the canonical target plus aliases, covering Slack names, raw IDs, channel:<id>, and session-resolved targets
- add regression coverage for the SZ-1136 case where announce fallback duplicated after a message tool send to #abel-channel

Fixes SZ-1136.

## Root Cause
Cron announce fallback suppression only compared the final resolved delivery target against the message tool target. In Slack, target resolution can canonicalize a configured name such as `#abel-channel` into `channel:C0AHNV28LQJ`, while the message tool records the visible send as the original name. Because the pre-resolved aliases were not carried into the fallback matcher, the run looked unsatisfied and sent the announce fallback.

## Tests
- `pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.cron.config.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.message-tool-policy.test.ts` — 40 passed
- `pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-plan.test.ts` — 11 passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-target.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.message-tool-policy.test.ts src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-plan.ts src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-plan.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Notes
`pnpm tsgo:test:src` currently fails outside this patch in `src/plugin-sdk/approval-reaction-runtime.test.ts` and `src/plugin-sdk/approval-reaction-runtime.ts` around `ApprovalActionView` / approval payload typing.
target.author: cbeltrao
